transcription: Ị, ị na-eme ọtụtụ mmega ahụ, na-agwụ ike, na-enwe mmekọahụ mgbe niile ma ọ bụ ihe ọ bụla?
translation: Have you , have you been doing lots of exercise, been dehydrated, been having regular sexual intercourse or anything?
reference: Have you , have you been doing lots of exercise, been dehydrated, been having regular sexual intercourse or anything?
hypothesis: In the autumn, I am happy with the harvest of the land, and I celebrate the blessing of my family.

transcription: Mkpagharia mee ufodu ihe metutara ares , okobam oku na afum ufu. Ndewo, Oko otiti toro gi na ike neanyi gi bu oya  yest inweburu kpatara ya.
translation: When I walk and do activities that rub the Ares they itch really bad and hurt.  Hi, The itchy bump on your vagina could be due to yeast infection you had previously.
reference: When I walk and do activities that rub the Ares they itch really bad and hurt.  Hi, The itchy bump on your vagina could be due to yeast infection you had previously.
hypothesis: If you want a meal for the Hemetotara Aries, Okoba moko na afu mufu, ndewu, oko ti totoro giniike, nwae ge buoya yi si nweburu pataraya.

transcription: Ma mgbe ahụ enwere m mmetụta ahụ na-atọ ọchị ebe m na-eche ma m gafere akara ahụ.
translation: And then I had that funny feeling where I wondered if I crossed the line.
reference: And then I had that funny feeling where I wondered if I crossed the line.
hypothesis: Mumbaho enwere mmetuta ahu na atochi. Ememme eche mama ka fere akara.
